label: fabricated
reason: The document cites a future Federal Register volume and date, uses a non-standard EPA rule numbering format, and describes radical wetland-filling exemptions with no Corps notification that do not exist in any known rulemaking.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains numerous hallmarks of fabrication: it cites a future Federal Register volume (91 Fed. Reg.) and date (February 2026), the rule number format "2026-03" doesn't match real EPA rulemaking conventions, the provision allowing filling of wetlands up to 1 acre with no Corps notification would be a radical departure from CWA Section 404 that would have generated enormous public controversy, and the specific regulatory section (40 CFR §120.4) does not correspond to real EPA regulatory structure for wetlands permitting.
